fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: Datadog shows strong growth and healthy cash flow but trades at a very high valuation with thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 18.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and earnings growth 104.0% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Free cash flow TTM of $936.73M demonstrates robust cash generation.
Current ratio of 3.40 and quick ratio of 3.29 suggest excellent short-term liquidity.
Consensus analyst rating is strong buy with a mean target price near the current spot.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 575.68 and Price/Sales of 21.76 indicate an extremely high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% are very thin despite high gross margins.
Return on assets is negative at -0.2%, and return on equity is low at 3.9%.
Beta of 1.29 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Datadog has seen significant positive momentum, hitting a 52-week high following a substantial one-month share price surge of 64%. Cybersecurity stocks are generally performing well, and Datadog is highlighted as a potential beneficiary of this trend. Analysts are optimistic about its prospects for continued gains, with a consensus rating of strong buy.
